_note: Booking.com property wizard, ONE page. Run `agentql-login` first to log in (CAPTCHA + OTP once); the session is saved in user_data_dir so this fill runs authenticated with NO CAPTCHA. AgentQL resolves the aliases below semantically — we refine them against the live page on the first run. @refs pull from stored property data via --property.
query: { property_name_input star_rating_dropdown address_line1_input city_input postal_code_input continue_button }
